title: lactuca rostrata
intro: Lactuca rostrata, also known as the beaked lettuce or rostrata lettuce, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lactuca rostrata include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
